title: polygala amara subsp. brachyptera
intro: Polygala amara subsp. brachyptera, also known as bitter milkwort, is a plant species within the Polygalaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Western Europe. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Bitter milkwort has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
